artifact_status: invalid / quarantined after Flamestrike visual rejection and Core reassessment

common_world_z_landmark_table.authority: front exact silhouette transition rows; identical feature detector applied to every view before UV construction

construction.single_boundary_rule: one exterior face for each occupied/empty neighbor pair
construction.front_half_x_rule: front positive-X pixels mirrored around X=0 inside the source half
construction.join: Y=0 center boundary welded after transform application
construction.haft: integrated pixel-resolution profiled circular half-cylinder with front-derived 157.08% static UV assigned before duplicate/weld

haft_texture_derivation.seam_endpoint_rule: exclude exactly one measured bright source-outline pixel per side from the exact selected-component span

final_topology_audit.explanation: one unique exposed occupancy boundary face per occupied/empty neighbor pair

static_uv_audit.mirrored_uv_preservation_method: UV-complete source half duplicated before transform and weld
static_uv_audit.strike_face_y0_mapping: right Ysample=-abs(Yworld); left Ysample=+abs(Yworld); one shared Z registration per complete face

core_reassessment.first_drift_action: outside the cylindrical haft interval, build_row_occupancy_factory formed one monolithic Cartesian-product volume from every front-row X cell and every right-row Y cell
proven_failures: whole strike-face motif duplicated instead of one half-face mirrored at the face centerline
head stretched/widened by repeating a complete face region around the shaft axis
strike-face pitch/taper not constructed as geometry
stone filled between the upper haft cap and head
pommel and top cap were not built as tapered rotational solids

next_decision: approve or revise a new component-geometry recovery contract; no current DCC execution authority
